summary: Iteration 54: Outbound Dispatch Window State/Phone Changes - All features verified. State dropdown with all Indian states is mandatory. Phone field shows '10 digits' label and validates 10-digit requirement for non-Easyship orders. Easyship orders hide phone field with 'Phone not required for Easyship orders' message. Form validation correctly blocks submission when required fields are missing.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (console warning)

critical_code_review_comments: INDIAN_STATES array (line 47-55): Contains all 36 Indian states and union territories
dispatchForm state (line 78): Includes 'state' field initialized to empty string
State dropdown (line 1776-1792): Mandatory with 'Required for GST' label, orange border when empty
Phone field (line 1737-1763): Conditional rendering based on order_source - hidden for Easyship, visible with '10 digits' label for others
Phone validation (line 379-386): Validates exactly 10 digits for non-Easyship orders
State validation (line 374-377): Blocks submission if state not selected
lookupAmazonOrder function (line 232-265): Auto-fills customer info including state from Amazon order data
Easyship detection (line 256): Auto-sets order_source to 'easyship' if order.is_easy_ship is true
context_for_next_testing_agent: Outbound Dispatch Window changes verified: 1) State dropdown (data-testid='state-select') contains all Indian states and is mandatory with 'Required for GST' label. 2) Phone field shows '10 digits' label and validates 10-digit requirement with real-time feedback. 3) For Easyship orders (order_source='easyship'), phone field is hidden and replaced with 'Phone not required for Easyship orders' message. 4) Form validation blocks submission if state not selected or phone not 10 digits (for non-Easyship). 5) Amazon orders show '(Auto-fills customer info)' hint on Order ID field.

State Dropdown.Contains all Indian states: PASS - 36 states/UTs including Maharashtra, Delhi, Karnataka, etc.
State Dropdown.Mandatory field: PASS - Orange border when empty, 'Required for GST' label
State Dropdown.Form validation: PASS - Blocks submission if not selected

Phone Field.Validation message: PASS - 'Phone must be exactly 10 digits (X/10)' shown for incomplete input
Phone Field.Input restriction: PASS - Only allows digits, max 10 characters
Phone Field.Form validation: PASS - Blocks submission if not 10 digits

Easyship Order Handling.Message displayed: PASS - 'Phone not required for Easyship orders' shown

Amazon Order Auto-fill.Auto-fill hint: PASS - '(Auto-fills customer info)' shown on Order ID field
Amazon Order Auto-fill.lookupAmazonOrder function: PASS - Implemented to call /api/amazon/order-lookup and auto-fill form fields including state

Form Validation.Submit button disabled: PASS - Disabled when required fields missing or invalid
Form Validation.State required error: PASS - 'Customer State is mandatory for GST compliance' toast on submit without state
Form Validation.Phone required error: PASS - 'Phone number must be exactly 10 digits' toast on submit with invalid phone
